description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust metal slide and frame. The grip is ergonomically shaped, with a smooth surface and subtle contouring for comfortable handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of standard length, extending slightly beyond the slide, and the muzzle is clearly visible. The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, contributing to a streamlined profile. No visible engravings or markings are present on the slide, giving the handgun a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a smooth, contoured grip and a flat magazine base, featuring a minimalist design with no visible slide markings.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the barrel, slide, and grip, with the flat magazine base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the muzzle opening, trigger guard, and the ergonomic grip contour.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the slide, trigger, and grip, with the magazine base and slide release area visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the grip, magazine base, and the rear portion of the slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured with a gentle curve to fit the palm, featuring a matte black finish and a seamless, untextured surface. It appears to be made of polymer or coated metal, with no visible checkering, stippling, or finger grooves. The grip is slightly flared at the base for improved retention, and there are no visible logos, embellishments, or ergonomic cutouts.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, continuous curve and no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is of standard size, providing sufficient space for finger placement, and lacks any visible texturing, reinforcement, or integrated accessory rails.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, cylindrical, and extends slightly beyond the slide. It has a smooth, unadorned exterior with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. The finish matches the matte black appearance of the rest of the handgun, and there are no visible markings or engravings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unembellished, contributing to a minimalist and utilitarian look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a rectangular profile and no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a smooth surface with no visible logos, texturing, or distinguishing features.
